run_summary.summary: Quiet morning on the brand deal front — 8 emails in, mostly personal (Amazon delivery, Venmo, Fast-Growing-Trees newsletter). One item worth flagging before filming starts: Walmart Creator notified Liz that the WalmartCreator.com platform contract terms have been updated. Smart to do a quick review before posting the BHG x Walmart Spring Social content so nothing surprises you on compliance or payment terms.

suggestions.message: Walmart Creator updated their platform contract terms today (Apr 18). Worth a quick read before filming and posting the Spring Social content — could touch exclusivity, usage rights, or payment terms.

deals.notes: [Apr 18]: Walmart Creator platform updated WalmartCreator.com contract terms — review new terms before filming/posting Spring Social content (link in email from notifications@app.impact.com).
deals.activity_note: Apr 18: Walmart Creator platform contract terms changed — review before posting BHG x Walmart Spring Social content.
